summary: A powerful magician, Mado, confronts a mysterious opponent who tricks him into pieces using magic. Despite being severely injured, Mado refuses to give up and uses his seal to unleash immense power. He freezes the poison wind and attempts to turn it back on his opponent. The two engage in a fierce battle, with Mado declaring that they will become enemies in the future.
key_moments: Mado is tricked into pieces using magic
Mado unleashes immense power from his seal
The two engage in a fierce battle
